item.name: Wind-up Ardbert
item.description:
What he lacks in size, he makes up for in heart...and his disproportionately large axe.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Ardbert minion.
item.tooltip:
As brightly as a hero's tale shines,
it is not without its shadows.
   - The Wandering Minstrel
item.specialactiondescription:
Renders ally Gates, Shield, and Search Eye impervious to damage.
Duration: 20s
